# Could circularity in reliable methods undermine this framework?

**Node Type:** antithesis
**Node ID:** d57b129d-a7c6-4594-aced-3c9ab8dd5537
**Depth:** 4
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Reliabilist Contextualism Summary](reliabilist-contextualism-summary-synthesis-b9442c5a-8eb2-4660-b9f9-f0b7378a7bd6.md)

## Content

**A circularity problem occurs if we justify a method's reliability by using outcomes generated by that same method.**, **Relying on context-dependent standards could lead to problematic justifications when we use a belief-forming process to prove its own reliability and truth.**
